title: ophrys × kingsleyana
intro: Ophrys × kingsleyana, also known as the False Bee Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys tenthredifolia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ophrys × kingsleyana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, although further research is necessary to fully understand its applications and potential uses.
